parameter.value:
<script>
(function() {
  function getCookie(name) {
    var value = "; " + document.cookie;
    var parts = value.split("; " + name + "=");
    if (parts.length == 2) return parts.pop().split(";").shift();
    return "";
  }

  var utms = ['utm_source', 'utm_medium', 'utm_campaign', 'gclid'];
  var queryParams = [];
  
  utms.forEach(function(utm) {
    var val = getCookie(utm);
    if(val) {
      queryParams.push(utm + "=" + encodeURIComponent(val));
    }
  });

  if (queryParams.length > 0) {
    var queryString = queryParams.join("&");
    var scripts = document.querySelectorAll('script[src*="leadconnectorhq.com/js/form_embed.js"]');
    if(scripts.length > 0 && window.location.search.indexOf('utm_') === -1) {
       window.history.replaceState(null, null, "?" + queryString);
    }
  }
})();
</script>

tag.name: GA4 Event - Appointment Booked (Stage 3 - Thank You)

parameter.value:
<script>
(function() {
  function getQueryParam(param) {
    var rx = new RegExp("[?&]" + param + "=([^&]+)", "i");
    var match = window.location.search.match(rx);
    return match ? decodeURIComponent(match[1]) : "";
  }
  
  function getCookie(name) {
    var value = "; " + document.cookie;
    var parts = value.split("; " + name + "=");
    if (parts.length == 2) return parts.pop().split(";").shift();
    return "";
  }
  
  var utms = ['utm_source', 'utm_medium', 'utm_campaign', 'gclid'];
  var storedParams = {};
  var d = new Date();
  d.setTime(d.getTime() + (30*24*60*60*1000));
  var expires = "expires="+ d.toUTCString();

  utms.forEach(function(utm) {
    var val = getQueryParam(utm);
    if(val) {
      document.cookie = utm + "=" + val + ";" + expires + ";path=/";
      storedParams[utm] = val;
    } else {
      var cookieVal = getCookie(utm);
      if(cookieVal) {
        storedParams[utm] = cookieVal;
      }
    }
  });

  var queryParams = [];
  for (var key in storedParams) {
    queryParams.push(key + "=" + encodeURIComponent(storedParams[key]));
  }
  
  if (queryParams.length > 0) {
    var queryString = queryParams.join("&");
    
    // 1. Restore to Browser URL if missing
    var searchStr = window.location.search;
    var prefix = searchStr ? "&" : "?";
    var missingUtmStr = "";
    
    for (var key in storedParams) {
        if (searchStr.indexOf(key + "=") === -1) {
            missingUtmStr += (missingUtmStr ? "&" : "") + key + "=" + encodeURIComponent(storedParams[key]);
        }
    }
    
    if (missingUtmStr) {
        window.history.replaceState(null, null, window.location.pathname + searchStr + prefix + missingUtmStr);
    }
    
    // 2. Decorate Internal Links
    var links = document.getElementsByTagName("a");
    for (var i = 0; i < links.length; i++) {
        var a = links[i];
        if (a.hostname === window.location.hostname && a.href.indexOf("javascript:") === -1) {
            var aUrl = new URL(a.href, window.location.origin);
            var aParams = new URLSearchParams(aUrl.search);
            for (var key in storedParams) {
                if (!aParams.has(key)) {
                    aParams.append(key, storedParams[key]);
                }
            }
            aUrl.search = aParams.toString();
            a.href = aUrl.toString();
        }
    }

    // 3. Decorate iframes
    var iframes = document.querySelectorAll('iframe[src*="leadconnectorhq.com"]');
    for (var j = 0; j < iframes.length; j++) {
        var iframe = iframes[j];
        var isrc = new URL(iframe.src);
        var iparams = new URLSearchParams(isrc.search);
        for (var key in storedParams) {
            if (!iparams.has(key)) {
                iparams.append(key, storedParams[key]);
            }
        }
        isrc.search = iparams.toString();
        iframe.src = isrc.toString();
    }
  }

  // 4. Watch for dynamically added GHL iframes (form_embed.js injects them after DOM Ready)
  if (queryParams.length > 0) {
    var observer = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) {
      mutations.forEach(function(mutation) {
        mutation.addedNodes.forEach(function(node) {
          if (node.nodeType === 1) {
            var iframesToCheck = [];
            if (node.tagName === 'IFRAME') {
              iframesToCheck.push(node);
            } else {
              var nested = node.querySelectorAll ? node.querySelectorAll('iframe[src*="leadconnectorhq.com"]') : [];
              for (var k = 0; k < nested.length; k++) iframesToCheck.push(nested[k]);
            }
            iframesToCheck.forEach(function(iframe) {
              if (iframe.src && iframe.src.indexOf('leadconnectorhq.com') !== -1) {
                try {
                  var isrc = new URL(iframe.src);
                  var iparams = new URLSearchParams(isrc.search);
                  for (var key in storedParams) {
                    if (!iparams.has(key)) { iparams.append(key, storedParams[key]); }
                  }
                  isrc.search = iparams.toString();
                  iframe.src = isrc.toString();
                } catch(e) {}
              }
            });
          }
        });
      });
    });
    observer.observe(document.body || document.documentElement, { childList: true, subtree: true });
  }
})();
</script>

<script>
(function() {
  if (window.__ghlListenerAttached) return;
  window.__ghlListenerAttached = true;

  var ALLOWED_ORIGINS = ['leadconnectorhq.com', 'highlevel.com', 'msgsndr.com'];

  function originAllowed(origin) {
    return ALLOWED_ORIGINS.some(function(d) { return origin.indexOf(d) !== -1; });
  }

  window.addEventListener('message', function(event) {
    if (!event.origin || !originAllowed(event.origin)) return;

    var data = event.data;
    if (typeof data === 'string') {
      try { data = JSON.parse(data); } catch(e) { return; }
    }
    if (!data || typeof data !== 'object') return;

    // GHL sends various event names across versions; catch all booking confirmations
    var isConfirmed = (
      data.type === 'booking_confirmed' ||
      data.type === 'appointment-booked' ||
      data.event === 'booking.confirmed' ||
      data.event === 'appointment-booked' ||
      data.message === 'booking-confirmed' ||
      (data.action && data.action === 'booking_confirmed') ||
      (data.eventType && data.eventType === 'booking')
    );

    if (isConfirmed) {
      window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
      window.dataLayer.push({
        'event': 'ghl_booking_confirmed',
        'ghl_event_origin': event.origin,
        'ghl_event_data': JSON.stringify(data)
      });
    }

    // GHL form submission events (Stage 1 - /pages/appointment-1)
    var isFormSubmitted = (
      data.type === 'form-submitted' ||
      data.type === 'form_submission' ||
      data.event === 'form-submitted' ||
      data.message === 'form-submitted' ||
      data.event === 'form_submitted' ||
      (data.formId !== undefined && data.type === 'submitted')
    );

    if (isFormSubmitted) {
      window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
      window.dataLayer.push({
        'event': 'ghl_form_submitted',
        'ghl_event_origin': event.origin,
        'ghl_event_data': JSON.stringify(data)
      });
    }
  });
})();
</script>

___TERMS_OF_SERVICE___

By creating or modifying this file you agree to Google Tag Manager's Community
Template Gallery Developer Terms of Service available at

Google may provide), as modified from time to time.


___INFO___

{
  "type": "TAG",
  "id": "cvt_temp_public_id",
  "version": 1,
  "securityGroups": [],
  "displayName": "Facebook Conversions API (CAPI) by Deviate Tracking",
  "categories": [
    "CONVERSIONS",
    "ADVERTISING",
    "ATTRIBUTION",
    "REMARKETING"
  ],
  "brand": {
    "id": "github.com_DeviateLabs",
    "displayName": "DeviateLabs",
    "thumbnail": "data:image/png;base64,"
  },
  "description": "Facebook Conversion API (CAPI) tracking solution in the form of a serverless simple-to-use Google Tag Manager extension that empowers you to track users on Facebook and get conversion data.",
  "containerContexts": [
    "WEB"
  ]
}

___SANDBOXED_JS_FOR_WEB_TEMPLATE___

/*eslint-disable prefer-template */
/*eslint-disable complexity */
/*eslint-disable no-shadow */
//permissions and Required Components
const log = require("logToConsole");
const getTimestamp = require("getTimestampMillis");
var copyFromWindow = require("copyFromWindow");
const injectScript = require("injectScript");
const Math = require("Math");
const getCookieValues = require("getCookieValues");

let formattedData = {
  templateVersion: "5.3.3",
  pixelId: data.pixelId,
  fbToken: data.FBToken,
  dtKey: data.apiAccessToken,
  dtEmail: data.LicensedEmail,
  eventName: data.StandardEvents,
  testCode: data.TestEventLabel,
  sendServerEvent: data.sendServerEvent,
  sendBrowserEvent: data.sendBrowserEvent,
  sendIpAddress: data.sendIpAddress,
  initializePixel: data.initializePixel,
  injectBaseCode: data.injectBaseCode,
  customData:{
    eventId: data.DeduplicationEventID,
    contentCategory: data.content_category,
    contentIds: data.content_ids,
    contentName: data.content_name,
    contentType: data.content_type,
    contents: data.contents,
    currency: data.currency,
    numItems: data.num_items,
    predictedLtv: data.predicted_ltv,
    searchString: data.search_string,
    status: data.status,
    value: data.value,
    orderId: data.order_id,
    deliveryCategory: data.delivery_category,
  },
  userData: {
    email: data.email,
    phone: data.phone,
    gender: data.gender,
    dateOfBirth: data.dateOfBirth,
    firstName: data.firstName,
    lastName: data.lastName,
    city: data.city,
    state: data.state,
    zip: data.zip,
    country: data.country,
    externalId: data.externalId,
    subscriptionId: data.subscriptionId,
    fbLoginId: data.fbLoginId,
  }
};

injectScript("https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/DeviateLabs/DeviateTracking/deviatetracking.js?ver=" + (Math.round(getTimestamp() / 1000)), () => {
  const fireDeviateTracking = copyFromWindow("fireDeviateTracking");
  fireDeviateTracking(formattedData);
  data.gtmOnSuccess();
}, (e) => {
  log("ERROR");
  log(e);
  data.gtmOnFailure();
});
